title: Stam1o Create S2
description: Fabric based lightweight vanilla+ pack featuring Create and a bunch of addons for it!
body: # **Stam1o Presents:** Stam1o's Create Pack, a Minecraft modpack designed to provide a limitless environment for your creativity to run free. Wheter you're a builder, redstoner or just a casual player. This modpack offers the perfect sandbox to bring your wildest ideas to life. Is a lightweight, fabric based modpack focused on the Create Mod for 1.20.1 put together by Stam1o and members of the community. Included in the pack are also a bunch of quality of life mods to help you along your journey such as Extended Drawers and Backpacks! For those who love building, Chipped will fill your builds with countless of new blocks that still fit in a vanilla+ pack. If you are looking for an improved world generation then Wilder Wild and Immersive Weathering got you covered changing the look while still keeping quite close to the vanilla generation. Finally with Create and the array of addons for it you can bring your world to life be that by a train, giant factories or a carousel, the choice is in your hands.  ## Main mods are: - Create - Create Deco - Create Enchantment Industry - Create: Steam 'n' Rails - Create: Power Loader - Create: Copycats + - Farmers Delight - Create Slice & Dice - Wilder Wild - Immersive Weathering - EMI - Chipped - Extended Drawers - A few performance mods ## [![Nodecraft Sponsorship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef67704ea76bfadc1a950915755dcb1b72300e24.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/stam1o) ## *All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible! Special thanks to oude_henky and BackupCup for helping with the pack.
